title: 皐月賞の後に・ビジョン

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of the Satsuki Sho, the very first
race of the Classic Triple Crown, is...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What happened in that race? And what is this
feeling?
(Urk!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I still feel so overwhelmed by the intensity in her
voice!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: GAAAHHH! UNGH!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'll win the next one even if it kills me! Don't you
dare think you've seen the last of me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Is it possible for her to get better—more than she
already has?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If she does, then next time I face off against her,
I'll surely—

Biwa Hayahide returns to the waiting room with a
dark expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is all because I let myself become arrogant...
Or maybe it means there's a flaw in my equation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I just need to figure out what my mistake was.
There must be a solution to it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: This was the result of a simple miscalculation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As long as I fix it, the equation should produce the
appropriate results, and I won't have to worry about
losing ever again...

Her voice keeps getting smaller and smaller until
she's nearly inaudible.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Derby! And I'm taking the crown
home!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win no matter what! You hear me?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be the Derby Champion! Yeaaah!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She certainly is excited... I can't believe we can
hear her all the way in here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But I have to admit... she is good.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry! Let's reanalyze things right away.
There's not much time left until the Derby, so we
can't waste any time...

The next stop on our journey together is the
second race of the Classic Triple Crown tour—the
Japanese Derby.

But hearing such urgency in her voice makes me
worry that something in her is beginning to crack.
